# MCP COBOL Server - GitHub Copilot Agent

This agent provides AI-powered assistance for COBOL mainframe development using the MCP COBOL Server.

## Capabilities

- Retrieve COBOL program source code from mainframe
- Access copybook definitions and data structures
- Analyze COBOL code logic and dependencies
- Answer questions about mainframe programs
- Provide context-aware code explanations

## Configuration

This agent is pre-configured with the MCP COBOL Server tools:
- `get_cobol_source` - Retrieve COBOL programs
- `get_copybook` - Retrieve copybook definitions
- MCP Resources for frequently accessed programs

## Usage

When working in this repository, GitHub Copilot will automatically:
1. Detect the MCP server configuration
2. Make tools available in Agent mode
3. Provide context from mainframe programs when relevant

## Best Practices

- Use specific program names when requesting source code
- Reference copybooks by their exact names
- Ask focused questions about program logic
- Request dependency analysis for complex programs

## Support

For issues or questions about this agent configuration, see the project README or open an issue.
